vs_support.more_info:
VS Morgana MAX W so you break
the shield during the combo.
weaknesses: No threat early vs bully lanes
how_to_play: Match roams and be present with your team or dive 2v1
Stop his engage with abilities (Janna Q, Poppy W, Morgana E)
Force him to stay in lane, pressure with poke or freeze (don't dive)

vs_support.more_info:
Very ADC dependant for matchup (!)
If ADC can 1v2 lane, he is extremly
strong in the game
strengths: Catch with R (not recommend long range R)
weaknesses: Exposed on trades bad vs CC / Hook
Low range early game can suffer vs
how_to_play: Punish in lane phase when trying to poke you (hook / cc)
Force him to stay in lane (if possible) or match roams or be first
For range champions play prio with wave and poke with range adv.

vs_support.more_info:
Struggles a lot vs dash ADC like
Ezreal, Lucian, Vayne...
how_to_play: Q had very long CD, force it and punish after
Vision on him makes it easy to play against (mid/lategame)
Squishy support in general (without Aftershock) play around that

vs_support.more_info:
You can W towards a minion to
engage (care with this).
Need E for trades (2 sequences).
strengths: Passive OP with ADC that can proc fast
Strong when E matter a lot (MF R, Ornn R...)
how_to_play: Don't get hit by Q in lane => punish when on CD
Roam and put pressure in map, care ADC must have waveclear
Poke in lane and get advantage with range (he can't engage)

vs_support.more_info:
Janna HAS to look to create pressure
with good roams and play around
strong carry champions (bruisers)
Cancel R if possible in fights (Naut R)
weaknesses: HAS to play with a strong teammate
how_to_play: Nami & Sona outsustain and win trades easy in lane
Hook champs OP because win lane and also pressure with roams and
can match roams (Janna strength)
Mages HAVE to win lane, but it should be simple if paired with strong ADC

vs_support.more_info:
Outscales engage and can build
easy HP vs them. Build Shurelyas,
Redemption vs Shield Breakers.
how_to_play: Zyra is skill matchup (or mages) hit Q on wave for prio level 2 to win
Roam and put pressure around the map if ADC can 1v2
Q of Rell and R of Blitzcrank break shields

vs_support.more_info:
Heal is probably better on Leona
most of the times, ignite vs 
healing champs.
Enemy ADC forced to go cleanse
strengths: Strong R against no mobility champions
weaknesses: No sustain can suffer before 1st reset
how_to_play: Match roams and be present with your team or dive 2v1
Force her to stay in lane
Stop her engage with abilities (Janna Q, Poppy W, Alistar Q)
Peel the target she CC's (Taric, TK, Milio, Janna R...)

vs_support.more_info:
VS Hook champions build Health
and stronger early if well position.
Forced to match roams (!)
strengths: Good damage with Q+E early and AAs
Strong powerspike lvl6 care paired HyperCarry
weaknesses: Low range poke, can't dive enemy pre 6
Weak roams (if you pick Engage, roam)
how_to_play: You outrange with abilities or you have better trade + sustain
Nami is skill matchup because Nami W is for trade and close range
Mages HAVE to punish to win & enchanters is AFK lane (depends ADC)

vs_support.more_info:
Really strong support if paired with
Caitlyn, Varus and Ashe. If not she
loses a lot of power in lane/game.
weaknesses: Bad at dives but good at taking tower
how_to_play: Zyra/Karma is skill matchup hit Q on wave for prio level 2 to win
Roam if lane is weaker
Look to all-in / trade when she wastes spells (missposition)

with_adc.gameplan:
Mage = weak til level 3
Roam whenever you can or look to all in.
Concede prio early most likely
with_adc.how_to_trade:
Once Lux is level 3 you can look to all in
CAN'T DO LONG TRADES
Wait for Lux CD to be back
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(EASY) Once Lux has "Lost Chapter"
she doesn't exist, feel free to roam
If you have kill potential look for it

vs_support.more_info:
You have to play around your
Aftershock in lane (if you have).
If not up, careful!
how_to_play: Shields or sustain vs E (even if you don't go AP)
Something to tank or disengage your R (Neeko W, Milio R...)
Build Mikael vs CC OP => do it instant when he W someone

with_jungler.vision_level1:
Sweeper start level 1. Cover my entrance
avoid enemy getting information.
Warding trinket if you want info in enemy jungle.
with_jungler.gameplan:
If you play strong botlane, play around that
If your ADC is not the main carry (Ziggs)
play with Mao towards the carry (top/mid).
with_jungler.important_info:
Very good with Hypercarry + Enchanter.
He has engage + creates space with R.
Strong early to transition weak botlanes.

vs_support.more_info:
ADC dependant for matchup (!)
Forced to match roams (!)
strengths: High range hypercarry or Lucian combo
Good scaling & OP R vs CC (Lillia, Leona...)
weaknesses: HAS to play with a strong teammate
how_to_play: Roam if lane is weaker
Prio into freeze if lane is stronger and then roam when ADC can 1v2
Pressure the map not the lane to win the game

vs_support.more_info:
Need E vs engage, you can play
for 2 sequence trades or focus
other player (bait shield)
weaknesses: Can't dive if Q miss (roaming opp)
how_to_play: Force her to miss Q => punish when on CD
Vision on her makes it easy to play against (mid/lategame)
Match roams or get something 2v1

with_jungler.vision_level1:
Need to secure her clear, if against strong
jungler, drop a ward to defend a possible invade.
Sweeper start if not to secure ganks.
with_jungler.gameplan:
You need to involve another carry with
Morgana and you to make a play.
No need to play around Morgana
with_jungler.important_info:
Morgana works with any support champ.
Voidgrubs are easy to contest
Play around a strong carry top/mid/adc

vs_support.more_info:
Build HP if lane is very diffcult
vs ALL-IN (Moonstone, Helia, Mikael)
Imperial Mandate 1st still very strong
weaknesses: Mana problems if spam early minutes
how_to_play: Roam if lane is weaker
Prio into freeze if lane is stronger and then roam when ADC can 1v2
Pressure the map not the lane to win the game

vs_support.more_info:
You have to play around your
Aftershock in lane (if you have).
If not up, careful!
strengths: Hook, point and click CC (R), first target
weaknesses: No sustain can suffer before 1st reset
how_to_play: Match roams and be present with your team or dive 2v1
Force him to stay in lane
Let him int with engage, disengage properly

with_jungler.vision_level1:
Sweeper start level 1. Cover my entrance
avoid enemy getting information.
Warding trinket if you want info in enemy jungle.
with_jungler.gameplan:
If you play strong botlane, play around that
If your ADC is not the main carry (Ziggs)
play with Naut towards the carry (top/mid).
with_jungler.important_info:
Very good with Hypercarry + Enchanter.
He has engage + creates space with R.
Good early to transition weak botlanes.

vs_support.more_info:
If lane is not winning Poppy can
roam and create chaotic game, 
you are force to match
how_to_play: Don't play near walls
Match roams or get something 2v1
Play with range and poke/play for tower

with_jungler.vision_level1:
Start sweeper 95% of the times.
Avoid enemy getting information where
Poppy is starting. Good for gank setup
with_jungler.gameplan:
If you play strong botlane, play around that
If your ADC is not the main carry (Ziggs)
play with Poppy towards the carry.
with_jungler.important_info:
Poppy works with any support champ.
Voidgrubs are easy to contest
No need to play around Poppy

vs_support.more_info:
In midgame ward in his jungle
so his Umbral Glaive pops early
weaknesses: Bad when his team lacks CC
Bad vs a lot of mobility
how_to_play: Match roams (ping as well) and give vision around that
Defensive vision in river to see where he moves
Play earlygame to deny him instead of looking to do your plays

vs_support.more_info:
Build MERCS vs heavy CC supp
(Leona, Lissandra, Lux...)
Q is the most important spell to
hit to survive lane
weaknesses: Not that strong as solo engage
how_to_play: Bully him in lane / you can CC and kill him easier than other engage
Match roams or roam first or get something 2v1
Stop his R engage if possible (Lissandra R, Leona Q+R, Milio Q)
Don't let him hit Q in lane or your poke is useless

vs_support.more_info:
Build Verdant Barrier vs 
disengage abilities to engage
with Rell
strengths: A lot of CC / break shields
how_to_play: Stop her engage with abilities (Janna Q, Poppy W, Alistar Q)
Match her roams and be present with your team or dive 2v1
Force her to stay in lane and not impact the map

vs_support.more_info:
Works really well with a duo for
W comms and wave states
Cleanse counters R on ADC
strengths: W very strong paired with bully ADC
R strong in teamfights vs ALL-IN
how_to_play: Play with range and poke if Mage / Enchanter
Roam if playing Engage, ADC can 1v2

vs_support.more_info:
Good vs free lanes like:
Rakan, Zilean, Janna, Braum...

Roam for souls in the jungle.

Not strong atm (needs change)
how_to_play: Freeze the lane after wave crashes and ggwp
Roam, she can't dive your ADC or hurt him
Pressure the map not the lane to win the game
Force early objectives, invade enemy jungle

with_adc.gameplan:
Weak, try to scale. Don't force many fights.
All in is ok, no long trades. Wait for ganks.
with_adc.how_to_trade:
Short trades so Senna can get souls.
Avoid getting poked a lot, try to use your
HP so Senna can farm and not get low.
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(HARD) When wave crashes or
the next 2 waves are non-cannon
(EASY) If she build "Statik"

vs_support.more_info:
If paired with Ashe they can kill
your ADC very easy with Ashe
Arrow, be careful with roams, be
botlane on cannon waves.
strengths: Forces your ADC to play with Cleanse
weaknesses: HAS to play with a strong teammate
how_to_play: Roam if lane is weaker
Prio into freeze if lane is stronger and then roam when ADC can 1v2
Pressure the map not the lane to win the game
Force her to facecheck vision, easy traps

with_adc.gameplan:
Mage = weak til level 3
Roam whenever you can or look to all in.
Concede prio early most likely
with_adc.how_to_trade:
CAN'T DO LONG TRADES
Wait for Seraphine CD to be back
with_adc.when_to_roam: (EASY) Anytime

vs_support.more_info:
VS Hook champions build Health.
Forced to match roams (!)
strengths: Best scaling enchanter in the game
Fast on map with E / OP teamfights
weaknesses: HAS to play with a strong teammate
how_to_play: Roam ASAP put pressure on the map
Freeze the waves DON'T perma push OR Dive if possible
Do early objectives (force early soul)

vs_support.more_info:
Very ADC dependant for matchup (!)
If enemy ADC can wave clear, 
engage is OP
weaknesses: Has to hit Q to play (dodge forward)
how_to_play: Roam if lane is weaker
Prio into freeze if lane is stronger and then roam when ADC can 1v2
Pressure the map not the lane to win the game

vs_support.more_info:
W from bushes can be a problem
ward it or respect and play with 
wave
strengths: R against Vi, Malza, Noct, Liss R...
weaknesses: Lack of identity if no good use of R
how_to_play: Dodge Q => long cd => punish
Don't get hit by W, if you have dash hold it
Poke & punish when you have windows to do so or play with prio

vs_support.more_info:
Taric gets countered when 
enemy ADC goes for Cleanse and
ignite but antiheal is bad to build
strengths: One of the strongest lvl3-4 in the game
how_to_play: Roam and impact the map
Play with range and poke, don't play all in vs him
Focus him first in fights (earlygame important)
Track R CD, he can't fight back to back plays (useless)

vs_support.more_info:
Control Ward to deny the W click(!)
Mikael good vs hook threat
strengths: W OP to move in midgame (rotations)
weaknesses: No real engage later in the game
how_to_play: Force him to miss hook => punish when on CD
Vision on him makes it easy to play against (mid/lategame)
Squishy support in general (without Aftershock) play around that

vs_support.more_info:
DON'T PLAY LANE IF YOU CAN'T
PERMA KILL THEM 2V2 OR DIVE
MOVE MOVE MOVE MOVE MOVE
strengths: Can be strong early depends on ADC
how_to_play: ROAM / FREEZE THE LANE IF STRONGER
DO EARLY DRAGONS
INVADE ENEMY JUNGLE

vs_support.more_info:
Zilean is good vs: Rakan, Braum, 
Renata
strengths: PRAY FOR LATEGAME PLS DON'T FF
Strong paired with fed jungle/top bruiser
how_to_play: Freeze the lane after wave crashes and ggwp
Roam, grandpa can't dive your ADC or hurt him
Pressure the map not the lane to win the game
The only players that lose against Zilean it's because they are scared
to trade in lane vs him, he does no damage, he can't get prio, he can't
fight early
Force early objectives, invade enemy jungle

vs_support.more_info:
Really strong support if paired with
Caitlyn, Varus and Ashe. If not she
loses a lot of power in lane/game.
weaknesses: "Bad" at dives but good at taking tower
how_to_play: Lux/Karma is skill matchup hit E/Q on wave for prio level 2 to win
Roam if lane is weaker
Look to all-in / trade when she wastes spells (missposition)

with_jungler.vision_level1:
Need to secure her clear, if against strong
jungler, drop a ward to defend a possible invade.
Sweeper start if not to secure ganks.
with_jungler.gameplan:
Zyra can hard carry when ahead.
Play around her CC+DMG => strong.
If ADC can 1v2, play with Zyra.
with_jungler.important_info:
Play around neutral objectives (R)
Allow Zyra to full clear for items.
Don't overforce outside objectives.

with_adc.gameplan:
Mage = weak til level 3
Roam whenever you can or look to all in.
Concede prio early most likely
with_adc.how_to_trade:
Once Zyra is level 3 you can look to all in
CAN'T DO LONG TRADES
Wait for Zyra CD to be back
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(EASY) Once Zyra has AP
she doesn't exist, feel free to roam.
If you have kill potential look for it

with_jungler.vision_level1:
Need to secure his clear, if against strong
jungler, drop a ward to defend a possible invade.
Sweeper start if not to secure ganks.
with_jungler.gameplan:
Secure his clear til level 6.
You need to involve another carry with
Amumu and you to make a play.
with_jungler.important_info:
Amumu works with any support champ.
Play around Amumu R
Voidgrubs are easy to contest

with_jungler.vision_level1:
Need to secure first clear, if against strong 
jungler, make sure you ward the opposite side
Ambessa starts. Sweeper start if not.
with_jungler.gameplan:
Good champion to play around if your 
ADC can 1v2 botlane, CC will help secure
a lot of kills and snowball with her.
with_jungler.important_info:
Strong with 1 item spike, very strong
with 2 items. When Ambessa has item
play more aggro with her.

with_jungler.vision_level1:
Bel'Veth NEEDS to invade.
1- Ward enemy jungle for early information
2- If Bel'Veth invades, use wards to cover camps
with_jungler.gameplan:
Be ready to move towards Bel'Veth plays.
The entire first 14 min the most important
champion is Bel'Veth.
with_jungler.important_info:
Bel'Veth loves voidgrubs (be rdy).
Perma invade play aggro in enemy jng.
Spikes good with 1 item, OP with 2
items.

with_jungler.vision_level1:
Need to secure his clear, if against strong
jungler, drop a ward to defend a possible invade.
Weaker jungler, ward to see where enemy starts.
with_jungler.gameplan:
CC + DMG => OP
You want to sync up with Brand plays
if you can CC he will ONE SHOT.
with_jungler.important_info:
Brand is VERY STRONG in skirmishes
and starts being a threat level 3.
Play around neutral objectives.

with_jungler.vision_level1:
Sweeper start level 1. Cover my entrance
avoid enemy getting information where
Briar is starting to make it easy for her to
invade the enemy jungle without them knowing.
with_jungler.gameplan:
Good champion to play around if your 
ADC can 1v2 botlane, Briar has to
snowball early to have good game.
with_jungler.important_info:
Strong with 1 item spike, very strong
with 2 items. When Briar has item
play more aggro with her.

with_jungler.vision_level1:
Need to secure his clear, if against strong

Sweeper start if not to secure ganks.

You need to involve another carry with

with_jungler.important_info:

Play around neutral objectives (R)

with_jungler.vision_level1:
Need to secure first clear, if against strong

Darius starts. Sweeper start if not.
with_jungler.gameplan:
Good champion to play around if your 
ADC can 1v2 botlane, CC will help secure

with_jungler.important_info:
Strong with 1 item spike, very strong
with 2 items. When Darius has item
play more aggro with him.

with_jungler.vision_level1:
Start warding trinket 100%.
Defensive vision level 1 in your jungle entrance
at 1:20 to avoid early invades.
with_jungler.gameplan:
Diana has to full clear.
If Diana doesn't get punished early game
you are winning. Sync up with her => OP
with_jungler.important_info:
Diana loves voidgrubs.
Play after level 6.
Don't overforce plays til 1 or 2 items.

with_jungler.vision_level1:
Start warding trinket 100%.
Defensive vision level 1 against strong jungler.
Ward enemy jungle level 1 against weak jungler.
with_jungler.gameplan:
Slow game, play enchanter if you can.
Make sure you don't overforce fights
in early, and later if even you will win.
with_jungler.important_info:
Mundo has a very fast jungle clear.
Strong in neutral objective, needs to farm.
Don't expect ganks from Mundo.

with_jungler.vision_level1:
Start warding trinket 100%.
Defensive vision level 1 in your jungle entrance

with_jungler.important_info:

Don't overforce plays til 1 or 2 items

with_jungler.vision_level1:

Avoid enemy getting information where

with_jungler.important_info:
Perma invade play aggro in enemy jng.

with_jungler.vision_level1:
Start warding trinket 100%.
Defensive vision level 1 in your jungle entrance

with_jungler.gameplan:
Evelynn has to full clear.
If Evelynn doesn't get punished early

with_jungler.important_info:
Play after level 6.
Don't overforce plays before 6.
Warding jungle entrance big priority.

with_jungler.vision_level1:
Start warding trinket 100%.
Defensive vision level 1 in your jungle entrance
at 1:20 to avoid early invades.
with_jungler.gameplan:

with_jungler.important_info:

Sweeper start level 1. Cover my entrance

Defensive vision level 1 in your jungle entrance

with_jungler.important_info:
Hecarim loves voidgrubs.
Don't overforce plays, 1 or 2 items strong.
Addicted to full clear careful to overforce.

with_jungler.vision_level1:
Sweeper start level 1. Cover my entrance
avoid enemy getting information.
If warding trinket not bad to cover for first clear.
with_jungler.gameplan:
Ivern is a support in the jungle, he comes
to a lane and afk/cover and play with them.
Find who can carry in your team.
with_jungler.important_info:
Tank is broken with Ivern because of
the value of his shield and the damage.
Ivern plays around you.

with_jungler.vision_level1:
Sweeper start level 1. Cover my entrance
avoid enemy getting information.
Warding trinket if you want info in enemy jungle.
with_jungler.gameplan:
If you play strong botlane, play around that

Very good with Hypercarry + Enchanter.

with_jungler.vision_level1:
Need to secure his clear, if against strong

Sweeper start if not to secure ganks.

with_jungler.important_info:

Start warding trinket 100%.
Defensive vision level 1 in your jungle entrance

Karthus has to full clear.

with_jungler.important_info:

with_adc.gameplan:
You can fight early, if he has Exhaust better
Once Karthus has some components you can
roam. You can all in CC and look to kill.
with_adc.how_to_trade:
All in and after CC fall back, if you are
winning pretty hard the trade you can
continue.
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(EASY) Once Karthus has "Lost Chapter"
feel free to roam.
If you have kill potential look for it

with_jungler.vision_level1:
Enemy jungle strong => ward secure clear
Enemy jungle weak => ward enemy jungle for
info (Kayn can abuse this)
with_jungler.gameplan:
Be ready to move towards Kayn plays.
The entire first 14 min the most important
champion is Kayn.
with_jungler.important_info:
Blue Kayn => engage good (CC+DMG)
Red Kayn => enchanter good
Kayn loves to do voidgrubs

with_jungler.vision_level1:
Start warding trinket 100%.
Defensive vision level 1 in your jungle entrance
at 1:20 to avoid early invades.

Play around him CC+DMG => strong.
If ADC can 1v2, play with Kha'Zix.
with_jungler.important_info:
Play sidelane attack with Kha'Zix

with_jungler.vision_level1:
Start warding trinket 100%.
Defensive vision level 1 against strong jungler.
Ward enemy jungle level 1 against weak jungler.
with_jungler.gameplan:

The entire first 14 min the most important
champion is Kindred.
with_jungler.important_info:

Sync up anytime you can with him.
4 marks is good, 1 item spike if ahead OP

with_jungler.vision_level1:
Start sweeper 95% of the times.
Avoid enemy getting information where
Lee Sin is starting. Good for gank setup
with_jungler.gameplan:
Good champion to play around if your

with_jungler.important_info:

2- If Lillia invades, use wards to cover camps

CC + DMG => OP

with_adc.gameplan:
Avoid big level 1 fights (weak)
Make sure Aphelios can farm, play for CS
Fight with blue gun or red/white. Purple = gank
with_adc.how_to_trade:
Utilize green gun range (vs weak botlane)
Wait til blue gun to play aggro and purple
to set up ganks.
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(HARD) With blue gun = waveclear
Next 2 waves non-cannon and enemy
botlane is an enchanter/mage

with_adc.gameplan:
You can fight early for prio and control.
Range supp: stack and punish enemy under
tower (build waves)
Melee supp: crash into bounceback = freeze or
gank setup / roam with crashing waves
with_adc.how_to_trade:
Make sure you gain bush control.
Ping to fight your Ashe, make sure 
once you have control you don't
overcommit. Play with control / waves.
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(HARD) If Ashe builds statik its very
easy to roam.
Next 2 waves non-cannon and enemy
botlane is an enchater/mage

with_adc.gameplan:
VERY SIMPLE: you play for towers / plates
Lane dominant champion
Once bot tower is gone, you rotate to the next
with_adc.how_to_trade:
Use range advantage to control early lvl
Wave control and zone enemies / poke
Punish enemy trying to farm minions
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(DON'T) Not recommended to roam
Roam if Caitlyn is behind / useless
TIP: get demolish if possible

with_adc.gameplan:
AVOID EARLY FIGHTS TIL LEVEL 2/3
Cassio needs mana wait after first base
(survive)
with_adc.how_to_trade:
You can all in level 2 with CC Support
Pay attention to Cassio mana before
engage
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(MEDIUM) Once she has 1 item you
free roam whenever especially when
enemy botlane is enchanter/mage

with_adc.gameplan:
You can fight early for prio and control
Crash into bounceback = freeze or gank
setup / roam with crashing waves
with_adc.how_to_trade:
Make sure you gain bush control.
Pay attention to Corki Q and W CD
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(EASY) Once Corki is level 6 you can
roam any time, before make sure
that you roam after cannon wave

with_adc.gameplan:
Fight early waves = you win
Crash => bounce back => freeze enemy botlane
NEVER PERMA PUSH WAVES WITH DRAVEN
with_adc.how_to_trade:
Make sure 100% you gain bush control.
Zone the enemy with FOG pressure
in lane or in the river (enemy tribush)
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(HARD) When wave crashes or
the next 2 waves are non-cannon
Better if enemy botlane has no CC

with_adc.gameplan:
Left click and see if he is stacking passive level 1 (early)
Q the wave for prio and level 2 control.
Range = poke / Melee = look to roam
with_adc.how_to_trade:
You can look for early fights once
you get level 2 control. All in are good
if Ezreal can follow.
with_adc.when_to_roam: (EASY) Good waveclear, can farm safe from far away and has escape

with_adc.gameplan:
Mage = weak til level 3
Roam whenever you can or look to all in.
Concede prio early most likely
with_adc.how_to_trade:
Once Hwei is level 3 you can look to all in
CAN'T DO LONG TRADES
Wait for Hwei CD to be back
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(EASY) Once Hwei has "Lost Chapter"
he doesn't exist, feel free to roam
If you have kill potential look for it

with_adc.gameplan:
Get prio. Jhin is very bad at hitting towers,
don't play for platings as main goal.
Jhin can spam Q on the wave for early prio.
Range supp = poke / deny CS
Melee supp = crash and freeze on bounce
or use it to impact the map
with_adc.how_to_trade:
Pay attention to when he needs to reload.
Last bullet = more damage to low HP (!)
W roots on your damage (!)
When Jhin has 1 bullet, short trade
When Jhin has finish reload, long trade
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(EASY) Once Jhin has some AD
(first base) you can roam any time.
Danger if the enemy is playing CC
support and there is a cannon wave
crashing. Jhin can waveclear with Q
and set traps to clear as well.

with_adc.gameplan:
Prio with Jinx Q, if weak lane, just farm.
If no jungle attention try to base on crash,
its ok to lose 1 normal wave for a good base.
with_adc.how_to_trade:
If I have lane control, play around waves.
If enemy is winning just look when they
missposition to get trades.
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(HARD) Next 2 waves non-cannon and
enemy botlane is an enchanter/mage.
If Jinx is not win condition and behind

with_adc.gameplan:
Careful with early trades in lane.
You can look to all in if Kai'Sa can hit, punish
enemy missposition.
with_adc.how_to_trade:
Kai'Sa Q is very weak when there is a
wave and OP in isolation.
CC => Kai'Sa W + Q iso = GG
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(MEDIUM) Once she has 1 item you
free roam and enemy bot can't dive.
(EASY) If she build "Statik"

with_adc.gameplan:
Fight early waves = you win (not vs Draven)
Crash => bounce back => freeze enemy botlane
NEVER PERMA PUSH WAVES WITH KALISTA
with_adc.how_to_trade:
Make sure 100% you gain bush control.
Zone the enemy with FOG pressure
in lane or in the river (enemy tribush)
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(HARD) When wave crashes or
the next 2 waves are non-cannon
Easy if enemy botlane has no CC

with_adc.gameplan:
Avoid early fights in general play for CS.
If enemy botlane is weaker you can look to get
lane control. Paired with enchanter play with W.
with_adc.how_to_trade:
You HAVE TO play around W of Kog'Maw.
W up = trade
W down = don't trade
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(HARD) Next 2 waves non-cannon and
enemy botlane is an enchanter/mage.
If Kog is not win condition and behind

with_adc.gameplan:
Weak level 1 in general. Have to wait for level 3.
Strong when wave is bounce or building wave.
Rotate with prio, pointless to play for tower.
with_adc.how_to_trade:
Playing Nami or Milio, buff and he plays.
CC supports wait for enemy missposition
and then you can punish.
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(HARD) When wave crashes or
the next 2 waves are non-cannon
Easy if enemy botlane has no CC

with_adc.gameplan:
Mage = weak til level 3
Roam whenever you can or look to all in.
Concede prio early most likely
with_adc.how_to_trade:
Once Mel is level 3 you can look to all in
CAN'T DO LONG TRADES
Wait for Mel CD to be back
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(EASY) Once Mel has "Lost Chapter"
she doesn't exist, feel free to roam
If you have kill potential look for it

with_adc.gameplan:
MF is bad at hitting towers.
You can fight early prio, MF is strong.
Crash and freeze on bounce or roam
with_adc.how_to_trade:
Use E from MF to secure skillshots.
Look to punish missposition in lane and
all in, dont make fights too long.
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(EASY) Once MF is level 6 you can
roam any time, before make sure
that you roam after cannon wave

with_adc.gameplan:
Weak level 1 in general. Have to wait for level 3.
Strong when wave is bounce or building wave.
Rotate with prio, pointless to play for tower.
with_adc.how_to_trade:
Look for all in when wave is coming
towards you, avoid early trade.
You play for long trades if Nilah can hit.
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(HARD) When wave crashes or
the next 2 waves are non-cannon
Easy if enemy botlane has no CC

with_adc.gameplan:
Weak level 1 in general. Have to wait for level 3.
Strong when wave is bounce or building wave.
Rotate with prio, pointless to play for tower.
with_adc.how_to_trade:
Look for all in when wave is coming
towards you, avoid early trade.
You play for long trades if Samira can hit.
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(HARD) When wave crashes or
the next 2 waves are non-cannon
EASY if enemy botlane has no CC

with_adc.gameplan:
Weak early, avoid long fights, probably concede
prio if playing against a stronger botlane.
Play for farm, once Sivir has BF/AD item then
she can play alone in botlane = roam
with_adc.how_to_trade:
Play around wave control. Crash and
move. Don't hit tower (low range).
CC into Q from Sivir, and back off,
short trades.
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(EASY) Good waveclear, once she has
BF or any type AD item she one shots
waves. Maybe be careful on crashing
cannon waves.

with_adc.gameplan:
Weak early, avoid long fights, probably concede
prio if playing against a stronger botlane.
Play for farm, you can roam later (level 6)
with_adc.how_to_trade:
Short trades so Smolder can get stacks.
Avoid getting poked a lot, try to use your
HP so Smolder can farm and not get low.
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(EASY) Good waveclear once he has 
some stacks (25) and AD, also his ult
is up he can clear a cannon wave.

with_adc.gameplan:
Mage = weak til level 3
You can play for all in if Swain connects E.
Concede prio early most likely
with_adc.how_to_trade:
Look to punish if you can land good CC
and Swain has CDs up (!)
If Swain hits E you can follow up. Short.
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(MEDIUM) If Swain is 6 he can play the
dive and also he will have decent
waveclear. Roam if there is better play.

with_adc.gameplan:
Mage = weak til level 3
Roam whenever you can or look to all in.
Concede prio early most likely
with_adc.how_to_trade:
Once Syndra is lvl 3 you can look to all in
CAN'T DO LONG TRADES
Wait for Syndra CD to be back (E, stun)
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(EASY) Once Syndra has "Lost Chapter"
she doesn't exist, feel free to roam
If you have kill potential look for it

with_adc.gameplan:
Strong level 2. Look to all in when is good.
Play for tower platings.
Don't jump/all in when wave is bad.
with_adc.how_to_trade:
Play around Tristana E (Bomb)
If Tristana con get full bomb explosion
you will most likely hard win the fight.
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(MEDIUM) Good waveclear has good
escape tool but needs some AD before
leaving her alone.

with_adc.gameplan:
Weak, try to scale. Don't force many fights.
If winning long trades are good. 
Wait for ganks or open mid with Twitch Q.
with_adc.how_to_trade:
Twitch engage with Q you can follow up,
long trade is fine against weake lanes
and you can bully for control.
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(HARD) When wave crashes or
the next 2 waves are non-cannon
BUT lvl 6 Twitch can clear cannon wave

with_adc.gameplan:
You can fight early with Varus.
Range supp: stack and punish enemy under
tower (build waves)
Melee supp: crash into bounceback = freeze or
gank setup / roam with crashing waves
Level 6 high kill potential with ULT.
You can hit and play for tower platings.
with_adc.how_to_trade:
Use E from Varus  to secure skillshots.
Range supp: poke together the enemy
under tower. Q Karma into Q Varus.
Melee supp: make sure you have wave
control and punish if enemy missposition
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(MEDIUM) Good waveclear but no 
escape tool, difficult to dive if he has 
ULT up. Also enemy botlane is an 
enchanter or mage you can roam when
the waves are not cannon.
If you have kill potential look for it

with_adc.gameplan:
Avoid big level 1 fights (weak)
Make sure Vayne can farm, play for CS
Fight when level 6 or getting jungle gank.
with_adc.how_to_trade:
Vayne has a really good trading tool, 
which is AA + Q + AA with PTA proc,
downside, range is really low.
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(HARD) When the next 2 waves are
non-cannon.
(MEDIUM) If she build "Statik"

with_adc.gameplan:
Mage = weak til level 3
Roam whenever you can or look to all in.
Concede prio early most likely
with_adc.how_to_trade:
Wait for Veigar cage to look for a trade.
CAN'T DO LONG TRADES
Wait for Veigar CD to be back
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(EASY) Once Veigar has some AP
he can't really get dove.
If you have kill potential look for it

with_adc.gameplan:
Mage = weak til level 3
Roam whenever you can or look to all in.
Concede prio early most likely
with_adc.how_to_trade:
Let Vel'koz poke and play for wave control
CAN'T DO LONG TRADES
Wait for Vel'koz CD to be back
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(EASY) Once Vel'koz has some AP
he has great waveclear.
If you have kill potential look for it

with_adc.gameplan:
Mage = weak til level 3
Roam whenever you can or look to all in.
Concede prio early most likely
with_adc.how_to_trade:
Once Viktor is level 3 you can look to all in
CAN'T DO LONG TRADES
Wait for Viktor CD to be back
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(EASY) Once Viktor has "Lost Chapter"
he doesn't exist, feel free to roam
If you have kill potential look for it

with_adc.gameplan:
Weak level 1 in general. Have to wait for level 3.
Strong if you can CC and play around feathers.
Rotate with prio, with Rakan take demolish.
with_adc.how_to_trade:
All in and if Xayah can root you hard win
the trade, look for enemy botlane to 
missposition and punish.
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(EASY) Good waveclear, once she has
BF or any type AD item she one shots
waves. Super safe with R up.

with_adc.gameplan:
Weak level 1 in general. Have to wait for level 3.
Strong when wave is bounce or building wave.
Rotate with prio, pointless to play for tower.
with_adc.how_to_trade:
Look for all in when wave is coming
towards you, avoid early trade.
You play for long trades if Yasuo can hit.
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(HARD) When wave crashes or
the next 2 waves are non-cannon
Easy if enemy botlane has no CC

with_adc.gameplan:
You can get prio for level 2 with her Q into weak
lanes and play control from there. If not make
sure she can CS and scale, look for good roams.
with_adc.how_to_trade:
Trade when Yunara has Q up, similar
to Kog'Maw W, when down just be patient
before trading. Level6 all in looks good.
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(EASY) Good waveclear, once she has
BF or any type AD item she one shots
waves. Care on cannon waves.

with_adc.gameplan:
Weak, try to scale. Don't force many fights.
If winning long trades are good. 
Wait for ganks or level 6 all in.
with_adc.how_to_trade:
Punish if enemy missposition.
Pay attention to Zeri E CD (dash).
Level 6 you are strong to fight.
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(MEDIUM) Good waveclear has good
escape tool but needs some AD before
leaving her alone. (EASY) "Statik"

with_adc.gameplan:
Take demolish with Ziggs if possible.
Mage = weak til level 3
Roam whenever you can or look to all in.
with_adc.how_to_trade:
Let Ziggs poke. You can all in.
CAN'T DO LONG TRADES
with_adc.when_to_roam:
(EASY) Once Ziggs has "Lost Chapter"
he doesn't exist, feel free to roam.
